title: Model Catalog — Consumer Subscription Plans
description: A SEPARATE dataset from the model catalog (Block F / T33): vendor consumer subscription plans (e.g. Claude Pro/Max, ChatGPT Plus/Pro, Gemini / Google AI Pro/Ultra). Plans are NOT models, so they do not live in ModelEntry. US-only. Every price is an INDICATIVE US list price — a reference only, NOT authoritative (verify with the vendor); provenance-gated (source + lastVerified) and never invented. The source file keys plans by consumer brand / company (lower-case) and omits the redundant per-entry 'vendor' (it is the map key); the published artifact adds 'vendor' to each plan for consumer convenience.

version.description: Schema major version. Breaking changes bump this.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 date the dataset was last updated.

disclaimer.description: Dataset-wide caveat: indicative US list prices, may be stale, exclude tax, verify with the vendor.

plans.description: Map of consumer brand / company (lower-case) to its subscription plans.

id.description: Stable slug, unique within the vendor (e.g. claude-pro, chatgpt-plus).

product.description: The consumer product the plan belongs to (e.g. Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini).

tier.description: Short tier key (e.g. free, plus, pro, max, ultra) — freeform, for grouping/sorting.

priceMonthlyUSD.description: Indicative US list price per month when billed monthly, in USD. Omit for a free tier (or 0). Excludes tax.

annualMonthlyUSD.description: Indicative effective US price per month when billed annually, in USD, when the vendor offers an annual discount.

currency.description: Always USD — the dataset carries only indicative US list prices.

features.description: A few short highlights of what the plan includes (not exhaustive).

url.description: The vendor's public product / pricing page for this plan.

indicative.description: Always true — signals this is an indicative US list price, NOT an authoritative quote. Verify with the vendor.

note.description: Free-text disclaimer/qualifier travelling with the price.

source.description: Provenance — where the plan/price came from (a vendor pricing-page URL). Required: never invented.

lastVerified.description: ISO-8601 date this plan was last confirmed against its source.
